description: Gemini CLI slash command classification registry (CL-01). Three categories: text_safe (forwarded as -p), parameterized_safe (interactive bare, text-safe with args), unsupported (terminal-only).

/compress.description: Compress conversation context to reduce tokens

/stats.description: Show session statistics and token usage

/resume.description: Resume a previous session. Bare: shows session list. With arg: resumes specific session.

/clear.description: Clear terminal screen — terminal-specific, no remote equivalent
/clear.explanation: The /clear command clears the terminal screen. Since you're in a chat interface, there's no screen to clear. Your conversation history is always visible in the chat.

/copy.description: Copy to clipboard — terminal-specific, no remote equivalent
/copy.explanation: The /copy command copies content to the terminal clipboard. In a chat interface, you can select and copy text directly from the messages.

/theme.description: Change terminal theme — terminal-specific, no remote equivalent
/theme.explanation: The /theme command changes the terminal color theme. Chat interface appearance is controlled by your chat platform settings.

/settings.description: Open settings TUI — terminal-specific, no remote equivalent
/settings.explanation: The /settings command opens an interactive settings editor in the terminal. Configuration can be managed through the settings file on the VM.

::costs.description: Show token usage and cost estimate
